lang.prosody: Good morning, gene dogs Atelier. This is Camille Aubert speaking. Am I speaking with N?

voice.name: en-GB-SoniaNeural
voice.mstts:express-as: Yes, hi. Yes, this is N.

lang.prosody: Good morning, N. I have your line registered to the Mayfair address. Is that still correct?
Thank you. For the file, may I take the last four digits of your order reference?
Thank you. Order G-D zero three seven zero four, Toy Poodle, Charcoal, delivered on the fourth of September. How may I assist you this morning?
I see. May I ask the reason for the return?

speak.voice: It's the coat, mostly. In the catalogue the Charcoal looked softer. At home under the lamps it's almost black. He's been well-behaved. He just doesn't quite fit the room. I can't say more than that.

lang.prosody: Thank you. We don't require a single reason. I'll note it as aesthetic and household-side, which covers both.

Before I open the authorisation, may I walk you through the alternatives one more time? Under section four, the Atelier can offer a hand-toning of the coat at your home, free of charge. A Concierge would attend within seven working days. The coat itself isn't altered, only the finish reading. A number of clients prefer this to a return.

Of course. The second alternative, which I'm required to mention, would be Re-Listing under section nine. He would remain with you for the standard fourteen-day window while we place him with a vetted household. You would receive ninety per cent of the placement price, as a credit against a future order.

speak.voice: I'd rather not have him here while that's happening.

lang.prosody: Entirely understood. In that case I'll proceed under section three point two, Atelier re-housing. He returns to Paris, your refund is processed against the original card, and the certificate is closed pending re-inspection.
White-glove collection from Mayfair, climate-controlled cabin, Paris-bound. The earliest collection slot is the eleventh of September, between ten and noon. Does that suit?
Thank you. The Charm Set and the Care Manual remain with you. They aren't part of the return. The Lineage Certificate facsimile in your member profile will update to in transit this afternoon.

He returns to the Atelier for re-inspection under section four. From there, the resolution is determined by the Quality department, between Re-Listing and Atelier residency. We do publish the resolution on the certificate when it's reached, so you will see it on the facsimile.
Is there anything else I can help with this morning, N?

Thank you. I'll send the Return Authorisation to the address on file within the hour. The return reason on file will read: aesthetic mismatch with the household. Please do reply if you'd like that amended before nine this evening.
Thank you, N. The Atelier will be in touch on the eleventh. Have a good morning.
